feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RAP: Draft do not transfer keyvalue into DB-Table
entry.content:
Hi,
i'am a beginner in RAP and I have the little curisously problem:

I have an managed application in which I want to enter values like  /DMO/TEST or only TEST as a key value in a table. The application includes 5 Tables, and 3 works fine, but only two doesn't work correctly. 

 

 

define table /***/chcklink {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  @AbapCatalog.foreignKey.screenCheck : false
  key modul          : /***/dt_modul not null
    with foreign key /**/chcksmod
      where client = /***/chcklink.client
        and modul = /***/chcklink.modul;
  key check_appl     : abap.char(12) not null;
  active             : abap_boolean;
... }

define table /***/chcklink_d {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  key modul          : /***/dt_pbs_modul not null;
  key checkappl      : abap.char(12) not null;
  active             : abap_boolean;
...}

 

 

This table is a child of the main-view. 

When creating a new data record, everything works fine, the values are available as  key or simple table-value in the draft table and it will show on the screen correctly. However, if I save it, the values are no longer transferred to the persistent table. 

Example: in this case the key-value will be not trafnserfed. in an another case, one of 5 fields will be not tranfsered !?
Draft (create new entry):

/DMO/Test is the key-value. Its definied mandatory.

Values in draft-table:

--> now apply new associated entry

In the main-screen the new entry is visible, but the main-screen is still in edit-mode.

-->saving the main view / main object

Screen is changing from editable mode to readonly mode, and the new created Entry in the subtable disappears.

in the corresponging main-db-table is a new entry, without keyvalue. 

When i try to create a new entry, it will  produce a shortdump, cause dupplicate key (empty value as a key-value already exists )

All associated tables are definied simliar, but only this one doesn't work.

My question is now : Could someone tell me whats wrong ?

I've tried with an uuid and the missing field as a non-key-field, but without a solution.

thanks a lot

Adalbert

codings:

 

 

 

 

BHEV:
managed implementation in class /nnn/BP_R_CHCKSMOD unique;
strict ( 2 );
//strict;
with draft;

define behavior for /nnn/R_CHCKSMOD alias SMOD
//implementation in class /nnn/BP_R_CHCKSMOD unique
persistent table /nnn/chcksmod
draft table /nnn/chcksm000_d

lock master total etag Lastchangedat
etag master Lastchangedat

authorization master ( global, instance )
//authorization master ( instance )
{
  create ( precheck );
  update ( precheck );
  delete;

  draft action Edit ;
  draft action Activate optimized;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare;

  field ( mandatory : create ) Modul;
  field ( readonly : update ) Modul;

  association _CHCKLINK { create ( features : instance ); with draft; }
...
}//********************************************************************************
define behavior for /nnn/R_CHCKLINK alias CHCKLINK
persistent table /nnn/chcklink
draft table /nnn/chcklink_d
lock dependent by _smod
authorization dependent by _smod
etag master Locallastchangedat
{
  update ( precheck );
  delete;

  association _smod { with draft; }

  field ( readonly  ) Modul;
  field ( mandatory : create ) CheckAppl;
  field ( readonly : update ) CheckAppl;

  mapping for /nnn/chcklink corresponding;
}

entry.title: Issue with @Aggregation.default: #SUM after 2023 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi All,

we were on S4 1908 and were using Analytics query with @Aggregation.default: #SUM.

But after upgrade to 2023 we are getting syntax error for @Aggregation.default: #SUM.

Calc. measure, pos. 48: Invalid default agg. #SUM - only #FORMULA allowed [Analytics] 

Can someone please help in this error.

entry.title: Deployment Error : 403 error in Fiori App deployed in S4Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP-ians,

I am currently working on an integration project between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and a External API. 
I am facing an issue with my Fiori app deployed on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. The app is working fine locally, but when deployed on the cloud, I am encountering a 403 Forbidden error when attempting to access backend data.

The solution involves the following steps:

  1. CDS and CAP Application:

    • I have created a Core Data Services (CDS) view in public cloud and consumed it in SAP BTP Business Application Studio (BAS).
    • I have developed a CAP application where I consumed the CDS OData service and implemented the backend logic for posting data to the External API.

  2. Deployment to SAP BTP:

    • The CAP backend is deployed to Cloud Foundry in SAP BTP, and I have created a destination for the deployed BAS service URL, which I am using to connect the Fiori app to the backend.
    • I have also tested my CAP backend service in Postman it is working fine.

       


      In Cap Destination I have also tried using the Authentication type as OAuth2clientCredentials.

  3. Fiori App Development:

    • I created a Fiori app that consumes the backend data from the CAP application. (the Fiori and CAPM are two different Projects in BAS).
    • The app works fine when running locally in the SAP BTP BAS environment. I'm able to interact with the external API through CAP backend as expected.

       

  4. Deployment to S/4HANA Public Cloud:

    • I successfully deployed the Fiori app as a Fiori tile to the S/4HANA Public Cloud.
    • In public Cloud, While accessing the deployed Application, the UI of the app loads correctly, I am facing a 403 error when trying to access the backend data (while loading the metadata of the backend).

       

  5. IAM and Authorization:

    • While Deployment, I have created the IAM App in ADT for the app, but since I am using a CAP backend (not RAP), I am unsure of how to bind the service of CAP to the Application to resolve the 403 error. Typically, the RAP service is bound to the app to resolve such issues, but since I am not using RAP, I need guidance on how to handle this scenario. I didn't added any services to this APP.

       

    • Additionally, I see a UAA roles is created in BTP environment up on deployment of CAPM application, if I assign the role to user will it resolve this 403 error.

       

My Questions:

  • What could be causing the 403 error when accessing the CAP backend from the deployed Fiori app on S/4HANA Public Cloud? is it due to lack of authorization or roles in BTP?
  • Are there specific configurations or steps I need to follow when using a CAP backend instead of RAP for Fiori apps deployed on S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • Is there any option available to import the CAP service to ABAP environment so that I could add the CAP service to application in IAM?
  • How can I resolve the 403 error and ensure that the Fiori app can access the backend data?
  • Will the error resolve if I assign the UAA roles to the respective User in BTP?

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Many Thanks in Advance!


Best Regards,
Arasu

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA ,SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: The workflow delegation is not shown in workflow log or SWI5 or in SBWP.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In the workflow log we can see the delegated person hold the work item along with actual approver. But for one workflow the delegated person is neither shown in the workflow log nor in SWI5 or SBWP.

But the same worktime is visible in Fiori inbox. 

My requirement is the workflow should show the delegation in workflow log.

entry.title: How to develop a custom outbound API in S/4 HANA Cloud to send XML data?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to develop a custom outbound API in S/4 HANA Cloud to send business data in XML/JSON format(With deep structures) to external system? We usually do it through a ODATA/REST API or a Proxy call where we do fill the required XML structure fields using ABAP code. I would like to know the approach for "Clean Core".  i.e. How and where do we define this API? How do we schedule this as background job?

Regards,

Rams

entry.title: Software Component (Partner Demo Development Tenant) Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
Hello Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a software component to develop multitenant SaaS products in the partner demo development system. However, I get an error like the one below.

SCLM(Software Component Lifecycle Management) application is not configured in the current business tenant

 

 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3530333

Resolution
TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant) is being used and in this tenant only predefined Software Components exist and other software components cannot be created:
 
  • Software Component ZPARTNER => Multi-Off Development
  • Software Component ZLOCAL => System Local Development which can not be transported or deployed


This is what SAP said about the error. In this case, we seem to be unable to create a software component, but is there a different way we can proceed? I wanted to ask you about something that can be done to create a software component.

Or do we need a different partner system so that we can create software components for our developments?

If we create a development package with the namespace we have previously registered in our partner development system and develop it with the ZPARTNER software component, will we have problems in the future when offering this product as a multitenant SaaS application? How should we proceed?

Reasons for Necessity:

Dear @FrankJentsch, your valuable comments and suggestions will make a great contribution. Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: Disable spell check in SAP Webdypro text edit
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to disable spell check in Webdypro text edit element.

This is integrated in FIORI tile.

UI Web Dynpro ABAP ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: HOWTO redirect and/or filter sapgenpse output
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can't seem to be able to filter (e.g., grep) or redirect the output of sapgenpse to a file? Even tried tee but it always outputs to the terminal and nothing goes into the file with all the usual redirect options (>, 2>&1 etc.)

Without being able to redirect or filter its output, it is almost impossible to script it.

Any ideas? Thanks.

entry.title: De activate (unhide) UI.HIDE feature from standard CDS view
entry.content:
In C_SUPPLIER CDS view we have BANCKIDENTIFICATION field it have has UI.HIDE annotation is active because of this we can see BANCKIDENTIFICATION field in CDS view level but not at "Display Supplier list" app level. business requirement to show this field in APP. 

Please guide me how we can show unhide or show  BANCKIDENTIFICATION field at app level.

entry.title: Sales Order as Custom Fields do not work
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have a request to add Sales Order from Account Assignment of Purchase Requisition Items to the screen Process Purchase Requisition (V2).

I have created a custom field named YY1_SALESORDERPURRQ with business context Procurement: Purchase Requisition Item, then I created custom logic using extension point Change of Purchase Requisition Item.

May I ask if there is any problem with my code in custom logic because it doesn't do anything at all.

IF purchaserequisitionitem-YY1_SALESORDERIDEXTPRQ_PRI IS INITIAL AND
purchaserequisitionitem-YY1_SALESORDERPURRQ_PRI IS INITIAL.
    LOOP AT PURCHASEREQACCASSGNMT_TABLE INTO DATA(prqaccountassgnmt).
        IF prqaccountassgnmt-SALESDOCUMENT IS NOT INITIAL.
            purchaserequisitionitemchange-YY1_SALESORDERPURRQ_PRI = prqaccountassgnmt-SALESDOCUMENT.
        ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Issue in processing multiple PO in behavior class using MODIFY EML statement
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a requirement to create new entries in existing PO Item-> Pricing Element where the values are passed from a behavior implementation class of a custom table in a loop.

MODIFY EML update statement (to create NEW entries inside a particular po item) works only for last PO in the loop, but not the earlier PO's passed from the loop. Note: COMMIT statement not allowed in a behavior class. I too tried with just hardcoded values outside any loop, by executing MODIFY EML statement twice for different POs one by one. Here too, only the last hardcoded unique PO->PO item-> pricing elements were created in the system.

How to make all POs inserted with new pricing elements when different POs are passed dynamically?

MODIFY EML statement:

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO1'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '1'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe1)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe1)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe1).

 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO2'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '2'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe2)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe2)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe2).

 

In the above code, only the last PO - 'PO2' is getting executed by creating new entries of pricing element in the 'PO2', Line item '0010'.

entry.title: How to read/save AL11 file in ABAP Cloud
entry.content: I would like to know how to access AL11 files in Cloud system. Earlier OPEN DATASET/CLOSE DATASET were the syntax to open and close file. Is that still valid syntax to access file?

entry.title: Determining which tables are required to recreate data in t-codes
entry.content:
I am a "non-technical" super user trying to communicate with our backend team about what fields/tables I need replicated from ECC to Azure. I will be using the information in Azure to build dashboards in PowerBI.

I am currently trying to replicate MB5B. When I go to technical data for the individual fields, I see
MBEW - Plant
MARA - Material, Base Unit of Measure
MSEG - Receipt, Issue, Current Quantities & Value
T001 - Currency 

However in doing some research online, I saw this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mb5b-tables-for-se16-download/qaq-p/7732455

It references a variety of other tables. Are these dependencies? How can I get this information on my own?

Is using the "technical information" the best way to get the underlying tables as someone who does not have access to SE16?

How do I find out what tables are used to make a structure, like in the case of RFPOSXEXT which is the structure displaying information in FBL3N?

entry.title: How to view or access CPI Audit Logs?
entry.content:
Hi CPI/BTP Experts,

I am currently trying to access the CPI Audit Log but cannot let it appear under my subscriptions.

My friend was able to show me a sample screenshot below of what it looks like:

 

Are the sap notes correct or event relevant?

3463319 - How to view IAS audit logs in Audit Log Viewer
3298228 - How to access SAP Audit Log Viewer Service

 

Let me know if I am looking at the correct notes, if not, let me know what the most relevant note is.

Thanks,

newcloudguy

entry.title: Account is currently blocked by user RFC_ALE during IDOC creation
entry.content:
Hi ALE/IDOC guys,

Please kindly provide some comments or suggestions on my locking error below:

Account is currently blocked by user RFC_ALE.

This kind of error does not occur all the time, but it was encountered by my teammate once.

What is the root cause of this and if you experienced this before, how were you able to avoid this error?

Let me know guys.

Newcloudguy

entry.title: API integration for PLANT master data
entry.content:
Hi gurus, hope all are doing good.

We have new integration project to integrate SAP with PROCOL. The requirement in front of me now is
to create API (ODATA) so that the user can CREATE (POST Method) and UPDATE ( PUT Method ) can be used
for PLANT Master Data. After doing some research I have found that like the way we have BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVE_DATA for material master
we don't have any such BAPI for PLANT master data.
How can I achieve functionality of creating API (ODATA)  for plant master data ?

entry.title: TASK LIST OPERATION LONG TEXT TD NAME COMBINATION
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing a problem while extracting the data of task list operation & header long text.

Could anybody please help by telling me what is the combination of long text TDNAME in task list operation & header long text?

entry.title: Consuming API Hub Services in ABAP Cloud (RAP)
entry.content:
This document explains how to call the HTTP services in ABAP Cloud, from the SAP API Hub

• In this example we obtaining Email address by providing address number and Business Partner Number. Over View •

Step-1:consume an external API from the SAP API Hub


 https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/resource/Email_ Address

• Step-2: Calling the API in ABAP Cloud Platform.

 CLASS zemail DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .
PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS get_email_id IMPORTING addrnr TYPE string bpnumber TYPE string EXPORTING emailid
TYPE string.
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zemail IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD get_email_id.
DATA: lv_url TYPE string,
lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client.
TYPES:
BEGIN OF ty_metadata,
id TYPE string,
uri TYPE string,
type TYPE string,
END OF ty_metadata,

BEGIN OF ty_address_email,
__metadata TYPE ty_metadata,
addressid TYPE string,
person TYPE string,
ordinalnumber TYPE string,
isdefaultemailaddress TYPE string,
emailaddress TYPE string,
searchemailaddress TYPE string,
addresscommunicationremarktext TYPE string,
END OF ty_address_email,
BEGIN OF ty_root,
__count TYPE string,
results TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_address_email WITH EMPTY KEY,
END OF ty_root,
BEGIN OF ty_root1,
d TYPE ty_root,
END OF ty_root1.
DATA : lv_root TYPE ty_root1.

lv_url = |https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/
/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartnerAddress(BusinessPartner='{ bpnumber
}',AddressID='{ addrnr }')/to_EmailAddress?$top=50&$inlinecount=allpages|.
TRY.
lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(
i_destination = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( i_url = lv_url ) ).
CATCH cx_web_http_client_error cx_http_dest_provider_error.
"handle exception
ENDTRY.

DATA(lo_request) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).
lo_request->set_header_fields( VALUE #(
( name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json')
( name = 'DataServiceVersion' value = '2.0' )
)
).

lo_request->set_authorization_basic(

EXPORTING i_username = <User name>

i_password = <password>

RECEIVING r_value = DATA(l_value) ).

TRY. DATA(lv_response) = lo_http_client->execute(

i_method = if_web_http_client=>get )->get_text( ).

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error cx_web_message_error.

"handle exception ENDTRY.

lo_request->get_last_error(
RECEIVING
rc = DATA(lv_error)
).

/ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
EXPORTING
json = lv_response
CHANGING
data = lv_root ).

LOOP AT lv_root-d-results INTO DATA(wa).
IF emailid = ' '.
emailid = wa-emailaddress.
ELSE.
CONCATENATE emailid wa-emailaddress INTO emailid SEPARATED BY ','.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Custom Value Help Creation For a Particular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
This blog is about implementing value help using custom entity.

This is one of the way to implement value help.

Introduction 

 In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming), a custom entity refers to a user-defined data model that represents business data specific to your needs. It’s typically created using Core Data Services (CDS) views and exposed as an OData service for consumption in applications like Fiori.

Custom entities in RAP empower developers to create tailored data models that fit unique business scenarios while easily integrating with SAP's cloud and UI platforms.

The custom entity provides a structure and implements the logic via an ABAP class. The entity itself does not contain any data but must always be called by the SADL framework first. This is why custom entities are mainly used in RAP applications.

In this blog we will make Value help for Status field In our RAP Project.

Final Output :-

 

 

Implementation

In the first step, we begin by creating the Core Data Service and the ABAP class.

1. Class

Since the class in the annotation is also checked when the custom entity is created, we implement the empty class first.

To do this, we create the class and use the interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER, which expects the custom entity.

 

 

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
* write logic here


  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

2. Core Data Service

In the next step, we create the Core Data Service using the context menu. We use the CDS template "defineCustomEntityWithParameters" as a template:-

 

 

 Now Add This annotation at CDS

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'

 

Now We will create two fields:

  • First we create a status field with appropriate data type. In this we will enter the description of the status field.
  •  The next field is the short description of the status. ( ex: N   = New ).

Since we are using built-in data types, we also set the label and tooltip for the user so that the texts appear in the UI.

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help cds for status data element'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'
define custom entity ZCDi_status_VH
{
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Currently available status'
    key status : abap.char(10);
    
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status(Short)'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Short Name for the status'
    Status_short : abap.char(1);
     
}

 

We have now created the basic elements that we need for the search help. In this section we implement the necessary logic to see data in the UI.

 To do this, we bind the search help to the field in the projection view.

 

   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZCDI_STATUS_VH', element: 'status' } }]
      Status,

 

Since value help must also be released externally, you should include the view in your service definition.

(NOTE: Expose only if you did association with the custom CDS. In this case we will do ) .

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Employee table service defination'
define service Zsd_empheader {
  expose zcdp_Empheader;
  expose zcdp_address;
  expose zcdp_items;
  expose ZCDi_status_VH;
}

 

3. Extending the previously defined class

Let's now extend the query class with the logic we need to be able to use the value help easily. To do this, we need an internal table with the data type of the custom entity. We fill this with the appropriate data

 

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).

 

 

To return the data, we still have to call the appropriate REPSONSE methods. Here it is important to only call the methods if the framework requests it, otherwise an error will occur. Therefore, we first ask whether the fields have been requested and then call the method. It is also important that the two methods must always be implemented and should not, for example, be in a TRY/CATCH, where they may not be called if an error occurs.

 

    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

 

In addition to this method, we also must call the GET_PAGING method, for which we receive a similar error. The call to the methods must be implemented within the method call.

 

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

Complete Class will look like this.

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).


    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Now  we have to associate our custom CDS with the root CDS where status field is present and expose the custom status entity.

 

association  to ZCDi_status_VH   as _status       on  $projection.Status = _status.status.

*expose it
_status,

 

  • status -> Field in the custom entity.
  • Status -> field in the root CDS.
  •  

Result :-

 

On Clicking value help , value help window will appear.

 

On clicking to the required status, it will populate In the field.

entry.title: OData service for Fiori Analytical Table - sap.ui.table.AnalyticalTable
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

I'm looking for information, documentation, tutorials, anything that clarify how to build or annotate an OData service for the Fiori Analytical Table control:

https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/analytical-table-alv/

I would like to expose data from one simple custom Z table in an S/4HANA on premise backend. The approach would ideally be using RAP, but any suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Douglas
